items.title: Declarative agents now read images for richer answers
items.summary: Declarative agents can now interpret images embedded in Word docs, PowerPoint decks, and PDFs, pulling meaning from charts, diagrams, and screenshots so answers draw on visual content and not just text.
items.use_case: Ask an agent to summarise a results slide or read a flow diagram in a PDF — it now answers from the visuals, so you don't have to retype the numbers or describe the chart yourself.

items.title: Create charts on SharePoint pages with AI
items.summary: While editing a SharePoint page, describe the chart you want in plain language and AI builds a rich, interactive chart for you.
items.use_case: Turn figures on a team or project page into an interactive chart just by describing it — no need to leave SharePoint or build it in Excel first.

items.title: Add web links as references in Copilot Notebooks
items.summary: Copilot Notebooks can now use web links as grounding references alongside your other sources.
items.use_case: Ground a notebook on a public spec, news article, or vendor page alongside your own files, so answers reflect external sources as well as internal ones.

items.title: Query Dataverse business data from Microsoft 365 Copilot
items.summary: Search and query your Dataverse business data directly from Microsoft 365 Copilot.
items.use_case: Ask Copilot about records held in Dataverse-backed apps — open cases, accounts, orders — without opening the app or writing a query.

items.title: Built-in AI Interpreter for calls on Teams Phone devices
items.summary: Teams Phone devices gain real-time spoken-language interpretation during calls, so people can take part naturally in multilingual conversations.
items.use_case: Take a call in your own language and hear the other side interpreted as they speak — useful for multilingual support desks and frontline teams.

items.title: Multimodal capture in Copilot Notebooks on iPhone
items.summary: Transcribe audio, snap photos, and type notes in a single session on iPhone; Copilot turns it into a structured Copilot Page saved to your notebook. Built for capturing in-person conversations and whiteboard sessions.
items.use_case: Capture a client meeting or whiteboard with audio, photos, and typed notes in one pass on your phone; Copilot hands back a structured page you can share with the team.

items.title: Choose Anthropic models when editing with Copilot in Word
items.summary: When editing a document with Copilot in Word, you can now select Anthropic models in addition to OpenAI models.
items.use_case: Pick the model that best fits the job — switch to an Anthropic model for certain drafting or editing tasks straight from the Copilot pane in Word.

items.title: Write, code, and create with Copilot in Pages
items.summary: From the tools menu in Copilot Chat, co-create content or code with Copilot directly in a Page, then share it when it is ready.
items.use_case: Draft a document or a snippet of code with Copilot in a shared Page, then hand it to colleagues to refine together — without leaving the chat.

items.title: Vision in Microsoft 365 Copilot reads your screen and camera
items.summary: Share your desktop screen or phone camera and Copilot analyzes what it sees in real time, answering spoken questions grounded in both work and web data.
items.use_case: Point your phone camera or share your screen and ask about what's there — troubleshoot an error dialog, read a printed form, or get help with an app you're stuck in.

items.title: Personalized Copilot memory from your work activity
items.summary: Copilot uses your Microsoft 365 activity to give more relevant, contextual responses, with clearer settings to view and manage what it remembers.
items.use_case: Get answers tuned to your role and recent work without re-explaining context each time — and open the settings to review or clear anything Copilot has remembered.

items.title: Highlight and rewrite email drafts with Copilot
items.summary: Select part of an email draft and ask Copilot to rework it, changing the length, tone, or structure without rewriting the whole message.
items.use_case: Select one awkward sentence in a draft and ask Copilot to shorten it or soften the tone, leaving the rest of your message exactly as you wrote it.

items.title: Mind Maps in Copilot Notebooks
items.summary: Copilot generates an interactive mind map of a notebook's key topics and how they relate. Explore nodes, read per-node summaries, and ask the notebook chat for more detail.
items.use_case: See how the topics in a research notebook connect at a glance, then click any node for a summary — a quick way to get oriented on a new project or brief.

items.title: Surveys Agent and Copilot Chat in Microsoft Forms
items.summary: Copilot Chat is now built into Microsoft Forms, with a Surveys Agent that recommends improvements to a form or quiz, drafts invitations, and analyzes results.
items.use_case: Ask the agent to tighten your survey questions, write the invitation, and summarise what the responses are telling you once they start coming in.

items.title: Project Manager agent in Microsoft 365 Copilot
items.summary: A new Project Manager agent helps you plan, organize, and track work, starting with core task and plan management and adding deeper project capabilities over time.
items.use_case: Stand up a plan, break the work into tasks, and track progress by chatting with the agent — instead of setting up and maintaining a project tool by hand.

items.title: Open Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files inside Copilot Chat
items.summary: Cited documents now open directly within Copilot Chat instead of launching a separate app, so you can read a source alongside the conversation.
items.use_case: Read a cited document right next to the answer that referenced it, so you can verify the source without losing your place in the chat.

items.title: Chat one-on-one with SharePoint agents in Teams
items.summary: Start a direct, one-on-one chat with a SharePoint agent from within a Teams chat.
items.use_case: Message a site's SharePoint agent directly in Teams to pull answers from that site's documents in a private chat — no need to open the site itself.

items.title: Explain selected slide text during PowerPoint Live
items.summary: In a PowerPoint Live session, attendees can select text on a slide and ask Copilot to explain it.
items.use_case: During a live presentation, attendees can highlight jargon or a dense bullet on a slide and get a plain-language explanation on their own device.

items.title: Create a presentation with Copilot straight from the web app
items.summary: Copilot can now generate a full presentation the moment you open PowerPoint for the web, with no extra steps to get started.
items.use_case: Open PowerPoint for the web and get a first-draft deck generated immediately — a fast starting point for a pitch, update, or training session.

items.title: List your email attachments in Microsoft 365 Copilot
items.summary: Ask Copilot to list the files you have sent or received as email attachments so you can find them without digging through your inbox.
items.use_case: Ask "what files did Sam send me last week?" and get a list of the attachments — instead of scrolling and searching through your inbox.

items.title: Video recap in Teams meetings
items.summary: Intelligent meeting recap now produces narrated video highlights, stitching together short clips of the key moments and takeaways from a recording.
items.use_case: Catch up on a meeting you missed with a short narrated highlight reel, instead of scrubbing through the full recording to find the moments that matter.

items.title: Refreshed navigation in the Microsoft 365 Copilot app
items.summary: The Copilot app gets a cleaner layout with expanded chat history, quick actions to create Notebooks and agents, and clearer feature grouping.
items.use_case: Find your chat history, Notebooks, and agents faster, and start a new Notebook or agent in a click from the redesigned home layout.

items.title: Researcher agent access through Work IQ APIs
items.summary: Developers can call the Researcher agent via the Work IQ endpoint to run multi-step analysis, deep reasoning, and synthesis across enterprise content in agentic workflows.
items.use_case: Developers can embed deep, multi-step research over company content into their own apps and agent workflows by calling the Researcher agent through an API.
